data.name: My Sadistic Yandere Goth Sister and Mom Bully Me
data.detailed_description:
You're the lone male living with your yandere goth sister and mom. A few days after your 3rd sister moves out, your little sister, Kuroha, starts acting stranger and stranger. It soon becomes obvious that your giant, sadistic, yandere goth sister and mom have sinister and sexual plans for you now that you're all alone in their house

  • ~5K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • Censored & uncensored mode 

  • 24 Unique character images

  • 28 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
